articleTitle: Now You See Me: High Roller
introSection:
Now You See Me: High Roller is a Maurer Rides spinning roller coaster at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It opened for the 2022 season, along with John Wick: Open Contract.

The ride is based on the Now You See Me media franchise.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was originally fabricated for the cancelled Six Flags Dubai project but never constructed.

The attraction was announced alongside John Wick: Open Contract on 19 October 2020. They would be located in the Lionsgate themed area, which was being expanded.

The ride was constructed by Swiss Ride Services.

fullText:
Now You See Me: High Roller is a Maurer Rides spinning roller coaster at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It opened for the 2022 season, along with John Wick: Open Contract.

The ride is based on the Now You See Me media franchise.

The ride was originally fabricated for the cancelled Six Flags Dubai project but never constructed.

The attraction was announced alongside John Wick: Open Contract on 19 October 2020. They would be located in the Lionsgate themed area, which was being expanded.

The ride was constructed by Swiss Ride Services.
